chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text: This chapter applies only to a Jefferson or Orange County port.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.003 — Applicability of Chapter

This chapter applies only to a Jefferson or Orange County port.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: This chapter applies only to a Jefferson or Orange County port.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
